app.tagline: AE Plugin Installer  •  no Google API
plugins.title: Plugins
log.title: Event log
dlg.no_version.title: No version selected
dlg.no_version.text: Pick an After Effects version at the top first.
dlg.no_selected.title: Nothing selected
dlg.no_selected.text: Tick the plugins you want to install.
dlg.del_config.title: Delete config
dlg.ae_not_found.title: After Effects {0} not found
dlg.ae_not_found.subtitle: We scanned all drives, but there's no After Effects {0} install.
dlg.ae_not_found.hint: You can point to the AE folder manually — we'll remember it. Usually something like D:\Program Files\Adobe\Adobe After Effects 2023
dlg.ae_not_found.browse_desc: Pick the Adobe After Effects folder (e.g. C:\Program Files\Adobe\Adobe After Effects 2023)
dlg.bad_path.title: Wrong path
dlg.bad_path.text:
No 'Support Files' inside the folder — this doesn't look like an After Effects install.

Selected: {0}
dlg.ae_running.title: After Effects is running
dlg.ae_running.text:
After Effects is currently open. Please close it before installing — otherwise plugin files may be locked.

When you've closed it, click 'Continue'.
dlg.summary.title: Pre-install check
dlg.summary.subtitle: Plugins to process: {0}
dlg.summary.not_enough: ⚠ Not enough free space on the drive.
dlg.imp.title: Import config
dlg.imp.choose: Pick a plugin config JSON file
dlg.imp.bad: Not a valid plugin config file.
settings.title: Settings
settings.blacklist.empty: Empty. Right-click an AE version pill and choose 'Hide' to add one.
settings.restart_hint: Language change takes effect after restart.
settings.telemetry.enabled: Allow sending anonymous reports with log contents
settings.telemetry.note: Even when disabled, an empty file is still sent (filename only — counters and your anonymous ID), with no log contents. Sending cannot be turned off completely.
settings.aepaths.hint: These paths take priority over auto-detection. The default path is usually: C:\Program Files\Adobe\Adobe After Effects 20XX
settings.aepaths.empty: No installs known yet. Use 'Add path' or 'Rescan'.
settings.aepaths.bad_folder: Selected folder has no 'Support Files' — not an After Effects root.
tcd.ae_path.title: Path to After Effects (optional)
tcd.ae_path.hint: If the app didn't find your install, point to the folder. The default path is usually: C:\Program Files\Adobe\Adobe After Effects 20XX. Leave empty to auto-search every drive.
tcd.ae_path.bad_folder: Selected folder has no 'Support Files'. Pick the After Effects root ('Adobe After Effects 20XX' folder).
log.no_ae: ⚠ After Effects not found. You can browse manually when installing.
ed.title: Edit config
ed.name: Name
ed.target_hint: You can use {plugins}, {scripts}, {scriptui}, {presets}, {ae_base}, {common_plugins}, {cep_extensions} — or an absolute path.

pluged.subtitle: Name, links and target for each file.
